sections.heading: API Overview
sections.content: The viz server exposes a REST API over FastAPI at `http://localhost:8741/api/`. All endpoints return JSON. The server is launched via `cortex viz .` and reads/writes the `.cortex/cortex.db` SQLite database.

sections.heading: Meta & Graph Endpoints
sections.content:
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/meta` | Project metadata: name, `project_root` (absolute path for VS Code URI construction), node count, edge count, doc count, tag count |
| GET | `/api/all` | Full graph payload: nodes[], edges[], staleness{}, verification{}. Staleness read directly from persisted column (ADR-009 — instant, no computation). |
| GET | `/api/nodes` | List all node IDs and titles (lightweight) |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}` | Full node detail including all fields |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/neighborhood` | Ego-network: nodes + edges within N hops. Query params: `depth`, `direction` |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/history` | Change log from node_history table |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/tests` | Test results for this node from test_results table |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/staleness-cause` | Human-readable staleness explanation with cause message, hash details, and verification info. Server-side join at query time (no new DB column). |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/source` | Source code for a node with focused line range from `level_3_location`. Returns full file content + `focus_start`/`focus_end` line numbers. |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/diff` | Diff of node's source against a baseline SHA. Query param: `sha` (optional — if omitted, auto-resolves from history: prefers verified/checkpoint, falls back to oldest SHA). Returns `{node_id, old_content, new_content, baseline_sha, baseline_date, commit_subject, commit_author, commit_date}` or `{error, reason}`. |
| GET | `/api/nodes/{id}/edges` | Inbound and outbound edges for a node (single hop). Returns `{inbound: [], outbound: []}`. |
| GET | `/api/history/since` | "Since" filter endpoint: returns distinct node_ids that changed after a reference point, plus the resolved baseline SHA/timestamp for scoped diff. Query params: `sha` (checkpoint prefix match), `timestamp` (ISO-8601 cutoff). Returns `{node_ids: [], baseline_sha, baseline_timestamp}`. |
| POST | `/api/nodes/{id}/verify` | Record manual verification. Body: `{reason}`. Stores both `code_hash_at` and `desc_hash_at` (ADR-009). Doc sections (`atomic_process`/`subtype=docjson`) now verifiable. |
| POST | `/api/nodes/bulk-verify` | Batch-verify multiple nodes. Body: `{node_ids: [], reason, verified_by}`. Returns per-node results with ok/error. |
| GET | `/api/search` | Full-text search. Query param: `q`. 3-stage: FTS5 → LIKE-AND → LIKE-OR |
| GET | `/api/check` | Recompute staleness via shared engine, write to DB, return `{statuses, summary}` (ADR-009). Vocabulary: CONTENT_STALE, DESC_STALE, LINKED_STALE, STRUCTURAL_DRIFT. |
| POST | `/api/rescan` | Re-run `cortex build .` and return updated counts |
| GET | `/api/source` | Read source file. Query params: `path`, `start_line`, `end_line` |

sections.heading: Project Switching Endpoints
sections.content:
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/projects` | List registered projects with `active` flag. Returns `{projects: [{path, name, active}], active_project}` |
| POST | `/api/projects/register` | Validate and register a new project. Body: `{project_root}`. Returns 400 if no `.cortex/cortex.db` found |
| POST | `/api/projects/switch` | Hot-swap active project. Body: `{project_root}`. Acquires lock, re-sets globals, returns same shape as `/api/meta` |

sections.heading: dFlow / Workflow Endpoints
sections.content:
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/workflows` | List dFlow `@workflow`-decorated functions with metadata |
| GET | `/api/tasks` | List dFlow `@task`-decorated functions with metadata |
| GET | `/api/workflow/{id}/steps` | Step breakdown for a workflow/task. Returns steps[], delegates, source |
| GET | `/api/workflow_graph_labels` | Step-edge labels for Cytoscape graph: `{from_id\|to_id: label}` |

sections.heading: Test Endpoints
sections.content:
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/tests` | List dFlow `@test_workflow` / `@test_suite` items |
| GET | `/api/t1_tests` | List T1 tests (unannotated pytest functions) |
| GET | `/api/fixtures` | List pytest fixtures with validates edges |
| GET | `/api/junit` | Latest JUnit/JSON test results per test name |
| GET | `/api/test-runs` | All test run records (timestamp, git SHA, summary) |
| GET | `/api/test/{id}/detail` | Fixture data and coverage for a specific test |
| GET | `/api/test/{id}/steps` | Step breakdown for a test function |

sections.heading: DocJSON Endpoints
sections.content:
| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| GET | `/api/docs` | List all DocJSON files. Query params: `tag` (filter by tag) |
| GET | `/api/docs/{id}/raw` | Raw JSON content of a doc file |
| GET | `/api/docs/{id}/render` | Rendered markdown + metadata for a doc file |
| POST | `/api/docs` | Create a new DocJSON file. Body: `{path, title, tags?, template?}` |
| PUT | `/api/docs/{id}` | Save updated DocJSON content. Body: full JSON document |
| POST | `/api/docs/{id}/move` | Move/rename a doc file. Body: `{new_path}` |
| POST | `/api/docs/rescan` | Re-scan docs directory and update database |
| POST | `/api/docs/import` | Import a Markdown file as DocJSON |
| POST | `/api/docs/mkdir` | Create a subdirectory. Body: `{path}` |
| GET | `/api/docs/subdirs` | List doc subdirectories for folder tree |
